title: Implement full cloud fallback per PRD spec
description: Current llm.js cloud fallback only triggers on Ollama error. PRD requires: (1) Timeout trigger: if Ollama response >5s, switch to cloud, (2) Consecutive error trigger: 3 consecutive Ollama errors → switch to cloud, (3) Auto-restore: after switching to cloud, probe Ollama every 60s; on success, restore local. Update llm.js with these three behaviors.
